other_observers: Tim Henson, Kathy Mimh-Dunning; Tim Henson
specific_location: 1/2 mile west of intersection of Logan County Roads 44 and 33 on north side of 44. Very near, if not inside, North Sterling State Park
description: Large, squat white bird with horizontal black barring on back and front, white face and black cap, yellow irises and black bill. Very “owl-like” round face, but without any ear-tufts.Behaviors: This bird sat on the ground on a low ridge over a hollow drainage in a barren winter wheat field. It sat pretty much motionless except to rotate its head mainly to look at the three of us observing on a road a couple hundred yards away.Call: N.A.Plumage: 1st year
